tactical_shape: relied on seeking Ronaldo via the flanks
Francisco Conceição brought penetration down the right after coming on
standout_players: João Neves — rising in front of Axel Tuanzebe to score in the sixth minute
Pedro Neto — provided the cross for the opening goal
Nuno Mendes — burst forward, only stopped by a last-ditch Aaron Wan-Bissaka intervention
Francisco Conceição — offered penetration down the right after his introduction
Cristiano Ronaldo — peripheral, had two half-chances and later stabbed two crosses wide
home_read.momentum: Portugal were frustrated by a draw, looked loose and skittish after conceding, and the punditry questions whether they can go all the way with Ronaldo occupying space for games on end.

tactical_shape: experienced side stayed competitive after falling behind
used short-corner routine leading to an inswinging delivery from Arthur Masuaku
standout_players: Yoane Wissa — exceptional shift and scored the equaliser with a well-taken header
Cédric Bakambu — tireless performance; twice threatened to deepen Portuguese discomfort
Samuel Moutoussamy — tireless in midfield and sparked the move that led to the goal
Arthur Masuaku — delivered the inswinging ball for the equaliser
Axel Tuanzebe — beaten by João Neves for the opener but part of a competitive DRC back line
Aaron Wan-Bissaka — made a last-ditch intervention to stop Nuno Mendes
fatigue_injuries: three weeks in Belgium observing quarantine due to the Ebola outbreak back home
little travelling support because of the same reason
away_read.momentum: Congo earned their first World Cup point and the performance is cast as tough, competitive and morale-boosting despite difficult circumstances.
